backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the bullet SVG animation in HeroSection.tsx with a cartoon chibi boy-shooting-at-bullseye inline SVG/CSS animation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags, manifest link, service worker registration, and the React root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports specifying app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background refresh strategy for static assets, skipping cross-origin and API requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid with icons.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements via add, edit, and delete operations backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and formatted nanosecond timestamp with hover effects and decorative accents.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component with brand logo, description, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section component featuring a looping SVG shooting animation (cartoon boy firing at a target) built entirely with CSS keyframe animations inline.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News section that fetches announcements via a React Query hook and renders a grid of AnnouncementCards with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, falling back to a default avatar image on error.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the roster section of the landing page, fetching team members via `useRoster` and displaying them in a grid of `PlayerCard` components with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose the current identity and login status via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor, including add, remove, and list operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds esports-themed utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in sequence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom esports color tokens, fonts, shadows, border radii, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a cartoon-style shooting animation feature, describing a looping inline SVG/CSS scene with a boy shooting at a target board inside a CTA button. Contains existing feature definitions, architectural notes, and a pending animation request.
